name: @visuelconcept/wui-ampere
description: Ampère — standalone WinCC OA WebUI page (/ampere + /ampere/:networkid): draw single-line (mono-filaire) electrical distribution networks (switchboards/TGBT, disconnectors, circuit breakers, busbars, transformers…) with an in-place edit mode, an IEC 60617 symbol toolbox, free DP binding per device, live wire energisation computed by graph traversal through closed switchgear, free/attached live measurement labels, and a proposal-only AI assistant that generates network models. Frontend-only, 1 DP per network (Ampere_Network).
